sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (haystack Nullable(String), token Nullable(String));
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (NULL, 'Test'), ('Hello World', 'talk'), ('Quick Brown Fox', ''), ('The rain in Spain', 'rain'), ('Jumped over', 'Jumped');
SELECT hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull(haystack, token) AS found_token, token IS NOT NULL AS token_exists FROM test_strings;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT haystack, token FROM test_strings WHERE hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull(haystack, token) IS NOT NULL) AS subquery WHERE token_exists = 1;
SELECT hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull(haystack, token) AS presence, haystack IS NOT NULL AS haystack_exists FROM test_strings GROUP BY presence, haystack_exists HAVING presence = 1;
SELECT hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull((SELECT groupConcat(value) FROM test_nullable), 'Valid') AS result, count() IS NOT NULL AS count_exists FROM test_nullable;
CREATE TABLE test_edge_case (edge_case Nullable(Int32), string_case Nullable(String));
SELECT hasTokenCaseInsensitiveOrNull(CAST(edge_case AS String), string_case) AS case_result, string_case IS NOT NULL AS string_exists FROM test_edge_case WHERE edge_case IS NOT NULL;
